title: Data Size Converter
description: Convert storage sizes from bytes to yottabytes.

openGraph.title: Data Size Converter
openGraph.description: Free data size converter for instant conversion from bytes (B) to yottabytes (YB), starting with binary mode (1,024) by default and supporting decimal mode (1,000).
